reviews.comment:
Elevadísimos precios de todo. No permiten que alguien tome mate cebado dentro del salón, ni siquiera habiendo consumido algo de cafetería o kiosco. No informan la clave de wi fi

(Translated by Google)
Everything is extremely expensive. They don't allow anyone to drink mate inside the hall, even if they've bought something from the cafeteria or kiosk. They don't provide the Wi-Fi password.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzek9DZ2R3EAE

reviews.comment:
Cero presupuesto para higiene de los baños. Desastroso. Una vergüenza saber que propios y ajenos que quieran conocer El Bolson o ir de paso tengan que sufrir el destrato de sus dueños - encargados.NO VAYAN!!

(Translated by Google)
Zero budget for bathroom hygiene. Disastrous. It's shameful that locals and tourists alike who want to visit El Bolsón or are just passing through have to endure the mistreatment by its owners/managers. DON'T GO!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzdEktYTh3RRAB
